diagrams.title: Date Command Format Specifiers Cheat Sheet
diagrams.description: A visual representation of common date format specifiers categorized by time components
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for constructing date format strings in Unix scripts and commands

diagrams.title: Date Command Option Flowchart
diagrams.description: Decision flow for using date command options based on user intent
elements: Start → Display current date? → Yes → date (default) OR date +FORMAT
Set system date? → Requires root → date -s "STRING"
diagrams.purpose: Visual guide to help students understand which option to use based on their goal
